global_description: Large mammal with a robust, bulky body, covered in thick fur, typically brown, black, or white. It has a large head with small eyes and ears, a prominent snout, strong limbs with large paws, and a short tail.

part_details.head: Large with small eyes, small rounded ears, and a prominent snout
part_details.body: Bulky and robust, covered in thick fur
part_details.limbs: Strong with large paws and sharp claws
part_details.fur: Thick, varying in color from brown, black to white
part_details.tail: Short and often hidden by fur

spatial_relations: Limbs extend from sides of body
